description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a wide, slightly curved front face and a prominent display screen. The cabinet is split into two main color zones: red on the left and blue on the right, with a gradient blending across the front and sides. The control panel is equipped for two players, each with a joystick and three colored buttons, and the coin slots are positioned below the controls. The marquee at the top displays the game title 'Clashing Crowns' in bold, stylized lettering, and the side panels are decorated with pixel art of a crowned knight holding a sword against a brick wall background. The surface appears to be made of hard, painted wood or laminate, with plastic and metal components for the controls and coin mechanisms. The overall build is robust and visually striking, designed to attract attention in public or recreational urban spaces.
description: A vibrant, upright arcade game cabinet with red and blue color zones, dual joysticks, and pixel art knight graphics on the sides. The marquee reads 'Clashing Crowns' and the control panel supports two players.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Clashing Crowns' marquee, large display screen, two joysticks, six buttons, and dual coin slots.
description_view_1: Left side view featuring a pixel art knight with a crown and sword against a brick wall background, and the cabinet's red color gradient.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back panel with a red-to-blue gradient and no visible controls or graphics.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same pixel art knight and blue color gradient.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two-player side-by-side layout with two joysticks (red and blue) and three colored buttons per player, arranged in a horizontal row; color-coded for each side
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the game title 'Clashing Crowns' in bold, stylized white and yellow text on a dark background, with a crown motif integrated into the lettering
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Pixel art of a crowned knight holding a sword, set against a stylized brick wall background, with a red or blue color gradient depending on the side
